case_title: CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. VS. MADE FOR RETAIL, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITITES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100078581) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. IN THE PUBLIC INTEREST

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100078581) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. IN THE PUBLIC INTEREST HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2019 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

PLAINTIFF THE CENTER FOR PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND SEPARATE JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH MOVING PAPERS BOTH SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-12-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT, PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F)(4) AND CCP SECION 664.6 JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT 1. BY STIPULATION OF PARTIES, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT UNDER CCP SECTION 664.6

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff the Center for Public Awareness, Inc.'s motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and separate judgment submitted with moving papers both signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
